name: Hwabao S and P SH-HK-SZ China Enhanced Value Index Fund (LOF)
summary: Hwabao S and P SH-HK-SZ China Enhanced Value Index Fund (LOF) is a fund managed by Hwabao Fund Management that tracks the S&P SH-HK-SZ China Enhanced Value Index. The fund invests in undervalued companies listed in Shanghai, Hong Kong, and Shenzhen, and it is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF), allowing it to be traded on the stock exchange.
